name: Kristian Uremovic
title: Cybersecurity Researcher & Student
education: Purdue University — B.S. Cybersecurity, Finance Minor
aboutLong: Cybersecurity researcher at Purdue University studying binary hardening, mechanistic interpretability, and embedded systems security. Active researcher through CERIAS and the Purdue Data Mine. Interested in the intersection of systems programming, compiler security, and machine learning interpretability.
